package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "crypto/tls"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for http_listen_non_tls: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `http.ListenAndServe` (non-TLS) usage in production-like code (not test files, not localhost bindings)
type CaseHttpListenNonTlsDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseHttpListenNonTlsModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseHttpListenNonTlsRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseHttpListenNonTlsModel
}

type CaseHttpListenNonTlsService struct {
    repo *CaseHttpListenNonTlsRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseHttpListenNonTlsAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeHttpListenNonTls(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseHttpListenNonTlsDTO) error {
    focus := "http_listen_non_tls"
    _ = focus
    _ = tls.Config{MinVersion: tls.VersionTLS13}
    http_listen_non_tls_negative := map[string]int{"http": 1, "listen": 2, "non": 3, "tls": 4}
    http_listen_non_tls_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    http_negative_0 := http_listen_non_tls_negative["http"] + len(input)
    _ = http_negative_0
    listen_negative_1 := http_listen_non_tls_negative["listen"] + len(input)
    _ = listen_negative_1
    non_negative_2 := http_listen_non_tls_negative["non"] + len(input)
    _ = non_negative_2
    tls_negative_3 := map[string]string{"tls": input}
    _ = tls_negative_3
    return nil
}
